title: Evaluation of defect depth in CFRP composites by long pulse thermography
type1_summary: No evidence of cleaned, replot-ready dataset files was found.
type2_summary: No evidence of raw/unprocessed dataset files was found.
classification_notes: Only one file was provided, and it appears to be a paper PDF/documentation rather than a dataset. Without content extraction from the PDF, classification remains conservative.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper analysis reports no data availability statement and no downloadable data files or repository links on the publisher page, so there is no paper-level evidence that this PDF is a dataset file.
file_classifications.file_evidence: The file is a PDF and, from the provided inspection report alone, appears to be an article/document rather than a data table or raw measurement file. No tabular structure, headers, or figure-specific data organization is indicated.
file_classifications.reasoning: Because the paper does not indicate any deposited data and the file is a PDF with no evidence of embedded replot-ready tables or raw instrument output, it should not be classified as Type 1 or Type 2 dataset data. It is best treated as documentation.
file_classifications.ambiguity: Moderate: the inspection report does not expose PDF contents, so this is based on file type and the absence of dataset indicators rather than a full content parse.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper develops and validates analytical and heat-conduction models for estimating defect depth in CFRP composites using long pulse infrared thermography.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to present analytical and heat-conduction models for defect-depth estimation in CFRP composites using long pulse infrared thermography, but no accompanying dataset or source data was identified from the provided information.
